subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Primal Point, Who beareth witness and declareth: "Verily, I am alive in the Most Glorious Horizon. Therefore, O people, bear ye witness!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نقطه الاولی یشهد و یقول باننی انا حی فی افق الابهی اذا یا قوم فاشهدوا
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @call to action, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
